title: Flea Treatment in Hollis, Queens | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Hollis, Queens starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Hollis home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Hollis, Queens, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size and severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and protect your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hollis residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. Our local technicians understand the unique pest challenges in Queens neighborhoods and deliver fast, effective treatments with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Hollis features a mix of single-family homes, multi-family residences, and garden apartments where fleas can quickly spread through carpets, furniture, and pet bedding. From the tree-lined streets near Hollis Park to homes along Hillside Avenue, our team provides customized flea treatment solutions for every property type in this historic Queens neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Hollis typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as flea eggs hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, after which the space is completely safe to reoccupy.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Hollis home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is important for effective treatment. We ask that you vacuum thoroughly, wash pet bedding, remove pets during treatment, and clear floor areas for access. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment in Hollis.
